diagnostics_hook:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(head -c 65536); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
[[ "$FILE" != *.graphql && "$FILE" != *.gql ]] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
if [ -f .graphqlrc.yml ] || [ -f .graphqlrc.json ]; then
  ERRORS=$(npx graphql-lsp validate "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -10)
  [ -n "$ERRORS" ] && echo "$ERRORS" >&2
fi
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
notes: Requires .graphqlrc config pointing to schema. Without schema, LSP can't validate queries.
